title: Is there an api that we can call to uninstall our app from monday.com?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Monday.com provides a webhook to track uninstalls initiated from their platform. However, is there an API that allows us, as a vendor, to remove the app from a customer’s Monday.com instance when they request …

posts.author: ParthAtRewind (Parth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Monday.com provides a webhook to track uninstalls initiated from their platform. However, is there an API that allows us, as a vendor, to remove the app from a customer’s Monday.com instance when they request an uninstallation from OUR end?

If no such API exists, we may need to redirect our users to the Monday.com app listing page to trigger the uninstallation process.

Thanks,
Parth

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ParthAtRewind

Bill here from monday.com

We don’t have an API function that allows for this and uninstalls of your app must be actioned by the user directly within their account.

I hope this helps.

Cheers,
Bill
